'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 4''' is the fourth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' graphic novels]] series.

==Publisher's summary==
''Four more tales of hyperkinetic [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] action! As the Clone Wars burn across the galaxy and the true intentions of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] are revealed, the true heroes of the conflict emerge. Chewbacca leads the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] against the Republic invaders on the jungle world of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], R2-D2 and C-3PO uncover a plot to assassinate Padmé, an orphaned refugee witnesses the rough life of a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] firsthand, and Anakin Skywalker fights alongside a young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who will play a part in his descent into the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]''.
